high_priority_findings.finding: Bot offline 360.0h (15 FULL days / 360h milestone). 82 A/B rules frozen. 8 runtime rules with 0 outcome feedback. Learning signal dead for 15 days.
high_priority_findings.action: URGENT USER ACTION REQUIRED: cd bot && python run.py paper
high_priority_findings.escalation: Every additional hour deepens the A/B graduation backlog. First rule graduation requires 20+ trades after restart = 1-3 days of trading.

high_priority_findings.finding: NEW THIS RUN: RULE_OUTCOME_FEEDBACK_GAP has structural evidence in graduated_rules.json. 4/8 rules show evidence_ratio=0.0 including hype_short_veto_v1 (239 trades) and btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 (40 trades). A 0% WR on 239 HYPE SELL trades is implausible — the feedback callback that updates evidence_ratio for veto/penalize rule types is not wired correctly. By contrast, the boost rule (BTC trend, evidence_ratio=0.75) appears correct. ONLY boost-type outcome callback is wired; veto/penalize rules silently never update.
high_priority_findings.action: ON RESTART: After first 5 closed trades, check if hype_short_veto_v1.evidence_ratio changes from 0.0. If it doesn't update, find the outcome callback and add veto/penalize rule update logic. This is blocking all 8 runtime rules from self-calibrating.
high_priority_findings.diagnosis: Outcome callback likely only increments times_correct for action='boost'. Veto and penalize rules need a separate callback path (signal was blocked by rule → did blocking this signal lead to correct outcome?)

high_priority_findings.finding: NEW THIS RUN — SOL COMPLETE BLOCKADE: SOL cannot be traded in any direction. SOL_LONG is runtime-vetoed (sol_long_veto_v1). SOL_SHORT is suspended in A/B tracking (SUSPENDED_LIVE_CONTRADICTION) AND blocked by RULE_CONFLICT_SOL_SHORT (92% confidence). The historical bot primary alpha source (+$5807, 63.7% WR, 179 SOL_SHORT trades) is ENTIRELY offline. Prior runs flagged SOL_SHORT conflict but did not state the complete blockade explicitly.
high_priority_findings.action: PENDING_HUMAN_DECISION: (A) Allow SOL_SHORT controlled probe at 50% gate to re-test. (B) Maintain full blockade. SOL_LONG should remain vetoed regardless — the evidence there is solid (24% WR).
